prompt_snapshot:
16:9 horizontal Chinese blog cover illustration, 2560x1440.
Use the provided chibi Avilia reference as the character identity anchor.

Scene: Avilia opens a fresh Hexo blog notebook for the first time. Four clean command cards float around her: "hexo new", "hexo server", "hexo generate", "hexo deploy". The mood is simple, first-step, beginner-friendly.

Core meaning: the default first post marks the beginning of the blog setup journey.

Style: clean Chinese blog illustration, white background, black/red/white, small blue terminal glow. Minimal labels: "Hello World", "第一篇", "开始".

Avoid dense tutorial screenshot, avoid giant title, avoid corporate landing page.
